about.title: The Professional Mind
about.subtitle: Bridging deep technical execution with forward-thinking business strategy.
about.bio: Amedee Erns Baptiste is a seasoned Senior Software Engineer, technology architect, and product builder. With a proven track record of helping startups, NGOs, universities, and international brands transition into the AI era, Amedee specializes in digital transformation consulting, CTO-as-a-Service, and custom engineering.
